description: Implement the Builder design pattern for the Employee class in the 'hr-core' Maven project located at ~/eclipse-workspace/hr-core. The Employee class in src/main/java/com/acme/hr/model/Employee.java currently contains 12 private fields. Add a public static inner class named Builder to the Employee class, featuring fluent setter methods for all 12 fields and a build() method that returns a populated Employee instance. Verify the implementation by creating a JUnit 5 test class at src/test/java/com/acme/hr/model/EmployeeBuilderTest.java that constructs an Employee using the Builder, setting at least 6 different fields, and asserting that the created object contains the expected values.
